package_sku.description: The platform-specific product SKU (stock keeping unit) for this subscription package. Passed to the payment/billing system to identify the purchasable product, used to look up package pricing details and to check user offer eligibility.

button_texts.description: List of promotion entries for this package, each defining text content and CTA configuration for a specific promotion type. The system selects the first entry whose promotion the user is eligible for (checked via android_offer_id); if none match, falls back to the entry with promotion_type "default".

promotion_type.description: The type of promotional offer this entry represents. Determines which promotion the user sees based on eligibility. Parsed values are: "default" (standard non-promotional pricing), "free_trial" (free trial offer), "introductory" (introductory pricing offer), "discount" (discounted pricing), "custom" (custom promotion). Falls back to "default" if the value is unrecognized.

cta_text.description: Title text for the primary call-to-action (CTA) button displayed below the radio buttons. May contain price placeholder tokens that are replaced at runtime. Processed through text processor for styled spans.

cta_sub_text.description: Subtitle text for the primary call-to-action (CTA) button, displayed below the CTA title. May contain price placeholder tokens that are replaced at runtime. Processed through text processor for styled spans.

secondary_cta_action.description: Determines the payment flow triggered when the secondary CTA button is tapped. Valid values are: "web" (opens web-based payment flow) and "in_app_purchase" (triggers native Google Play billing). Defaults to "in_app_purchase" if unrecognized.

secondary_cta_subtitle.description: Subtitle text for the secondary call-to-action button, displayed below the secondary CTA title. May contain price placeholder tokens. Processed through text processor for styled spans.

short_text.description: Text displayed on the right side of the radio button (in the discountText view), separated by a vertical divider. Combined with short_sub_text (joined by a newline) to form the rightText field. Hidden entirely when blank. Shown only when the radio button is in the selected state. Supports crossed-out price formatting.

secondary_cta_title.description: Title text for the secondary call-to-action button, displayed as an alternative purchase option below the primary CTA. May contain price placeholder tokens. Processed through text processor for styled spans.

description.description: Descriptive text shown in the buttonDescription view area between or near the CTA buttons. May contain price placeholder tokens that are replaced at runtime with actual pricing values. Mapped to the ctaDescription field in the domain model.

android_offer_id.description: The Android billing offer identifier used to check whether the user is eligible for this specific promotional offer. Passed to the subscription repository's isUserEligibleForOffer method alongside the package_sku.

title.description: Primary text displayed on the radio button for this package. Shown in the priceTextView with semi-bold font weight. May contain price placeholder tokens (e.g. package SKU references) that are replaced at runtime with actual pricing values. Supports crossed-out price formatting when a promotional_package_id is set.

promotional_package_id.description: References the id of another PackageApiModel whose pricing is used as the comparison (original) price for crossed-out price display. When set and the promotion_type is "discount", the system looks up this referenced package to calculate and show the discounted price relative to the original.

subtitle.description: Secondary text displayed below the title on the radio button, shown in the priceSubtextView with Typography.T4 style. Hidden if blank. May contain price placeholder tokens that are replaced at runtime. Supports crossed-out price formatting when a promotional_package_id is set.

short_sub_text.description: Additional line of text appended below short_text (separated by a newline character) on the right side of the radio button. Only included in the display if this value is non-empty. Supports crossed-out price formatting.

cta_action.description: Determines the payment flow triggered when the primary CTA button is tapped. Valid values are: "web" (opens web-based payment flow) and "in_app_purchase" (triggers native Google Play billing). Defaults to "in_app_purchase" if unrecognized.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subscription package. Used to look up this package in the packages list when matching it to a radio button component via the SubscriptionButtonApiModel's package_info_id field. Also used to find discount packages via promotional_package_id references.
